title: Crumbly Dutch Bok Choy Creme Brulee Crumble
description: A fermented and crumbly dutch dish featuring bok choy, served as a dessert with a caramelized sugar topping.
instructions: Wash and trim the bok choy, then cut it into bite-sized pieces.
Mix almond flour with sliced almonds in a small bowl.
Spread the almond mixture evenly on a baking sheet. Bake for 8-10 minutes until lightly toasted and fragrant.
In a blender, puree bok choy with maple syrup, lemon zest, and a pinch of salt. Pour into ramekins or small oven-safe dishes.
Gently pour the almond mixture over the top of each dish to create a crumble effect on top of the creme brulee filling.
Bake for 20-25 minutes until set but still slightly jiggly in the center. Allow to cool before serving.
For topping, sprinkle coconut sugar on top and return under oven heat briefly (about 1 minute) until caramelized.
